body_excerpt: In FaceStatsAnalyzer::InterpolateWeightList of face_stats_analyzer.cc, there is a possible out of bounds read due to a missing bounds check. This could lead to local information disclosure with User execution privileges needed. User interaction is not needed for exploitation.

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足
